title: Cavallo BFB (Draft Size) Cushion Pads (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo BFB Cushion Pads – Sold in Pairs Cavallo BFB Cushion Pads are Cavallo’s softest hoof boot pads, designed to deliver maximum comfort and protection inside your Cavallo BFB Hoof Boot (sizes 7–10). Made from a specially formulated microcellular foam compound , these pads provide exceptional cushioning that absorbs shock and concussion, reducing stress on hooves, joints, and legs. Due to their soft, forgiving design, Cushion Pads are ideal for acute situations, such as laminitis, founder, sole injuries, or other emergency cases where the horse requires immediate comfort and relief. They are highly effective during rehabilitation, offering gentle, supportive comfort for sensitive hooves. Features Cavallo’s softest hoof boot pads for ultimate comfort Made from shock-absorbing microcellular foam compound 10mm thick Fits Cavallo BFB Hoof Boots sizes 7–10 Removable insole cushions hooves and legs from concussion Ideal for acute laminitis, founder, hoof injuries, abscesses, bruising, and contracted heels Helps improve circulation and reduce fatigue during recovery Can be used to tighten boot fit when needed Sold in pairs The Cavallo Cushion Pad is also available in M1-M4 (CLB) and 0-6 (Horse) Sizes. Choosing the Right Cavallo Pad – Which Cavallo Hoof Boot Pad Does Your Horse Need? We always recommend keeping a set of Hoof Boot Pads available. They are an excellent tool for custom

title: Cavallo Comfort Sleeve (Sold in pairs)
text: [SHORT DESCRIPTION] The Cavallo Comfort Sleeve is designed for those who would like additional protection for daily use or while on an extra-long ride. Easy to use with an adjustable fit, these sleeves can be used with any regular-sized Cavallo Hoof Boot. [PRODUCT TABS] Full description --- The Cavallo Guarantee --- Have a Finer-Boned Horse? Trek is the perfect boot! The Trek and ELB (Entry Level Boots) are the best choices for finer-boned horses. Both styles have a unique front-closure system that allows for an extra-snug fit on the upper portion of the boot – creating a very secure fit. On a finer-boned animal, the wrap-around Velcro closures can be drawn to the front and angled downward when the boot is being fastened, creating an almost “V” neck at the boot collar, tightening the fit: --- The Comfort Sleeve by Cavallo Hoof Boots is designed for those who would like to give their equines additional protection from friction or rubbing during daily use, turnout, hoof rehabilitation or while on an extra-long ride. Easy to use with an adjustable fit, Comfort Sleeves can be used with any regular-sized Cavallo Hoof Boot. Simply pull the sleeve over the hoof and onto your horse’s pastern, and fasten the strap gently! Comfort Sleeves are perfect to use for comfort and protection while breaking in your new Cavallo Boots ! Sold as pairs ~ One size fits all ~ Machine washable Comfort S

The Black Master differs from other rasps -- anextra coating ensures material is released from the rasp more easily and makes the rasp more wear resistant. This rasp is particularly suited to horses that spend a lot of time outside and accumulate sand and mud that can negatively impact the wear process of rasps. On a finer-boned animal, the wrap-around Velcro closures can be drawn to the front and angled downward when the boot is being fastened, creating an almost “V” neck at the boot collar, tightening the fit: --- The Story Behind the Cavallo Barefoot Trim Manual From age 10, Lynn Seeley had been shoeing horses. He developed great respect, sensitivity and understanding for all equine breeds and their respective purpose and way of going. Most horses had a common assortment of problems. Reconstructions, resections, and treating founder and Laminitis were common practice. Lynn understands how the hoof affects the entire horse and went on to improve their well-being through the removal of metal shoes and trimming barefoot horses to health and soundness.
